note: BRAIN layer — Day 38 (Tuesday — UK May Day bank holiday). No new replies since 2026-04-04. IMAP gap: 31 days. new_replies.json unchanged — same 5 replies from Day 1. LinkedIn approach for leads 1, 3, 22 NOT confirmed executed Monday 2026-05-04 (no linkedin_profiles.json in 38 campaign days). Last acceptable LinkedIn window: Wednesday 2026-05-06 morning, BEFORE email sends. Absolute deadline — archive permanently if missed.
imap_warning: CRITICAL — 31-day IMAP gap. Reply classifications reflect only what HANDS collected on 2026-04-04. True inbox state is unknown. Wednesday 07:00: sweep leads 3, 22, 1 first. If conversion found: write CHANGELOG.md immediately — Campaign Milestone #1. Do NOT approach on LinkedIn for any lead where IMAP finds a reply.

action_on_new_reply_found.leads_1_3_22: If IMAP reveals any reply: do NOT approach on LinkedIn. Write entry to new_replies.json immediately. Re-run BRAIN classifications. If converted: write CHANGELOG.md — Campaign Milestone #1.
action_on_new_reply_found.any_other_lead: Write to new_replies.json. Classify. Update lead status. If unsubscribe: suppress permanently within 24 hours (GDPR Article 21).
action_on_new_reply_found.conversion_protocol: Log CHANGELOG.md: 'Campaign Milestone #1: first revenue — [business], [amount], [date].' Begin delivery same day.

warm_pipeline_resolution.brain_declaration: PRESUMED_LOST_NO_RESPONSE for all three. Email channel closed. LinkedIn window: WEDNESDAY 2026-05-06 morning — ABSOLUTE LAST CHANCE.
warm_pipeline_resolution.archive_trigger: If LinkedIn not executed by 08:20 Wednesday: archive leads 1, 3, 22 as LOST_NO_RESPONSE permanently.

lead_3.if_imap_finds_reply: Classify. If converted: milestone #1. If still interested: invoice today (Option B £350). Skip LinkedIn.
lead_3.if_no_imap_reply: LinkedIn connection note (see linkedin_connection_notes.json vd_001). Write linkedin_profiles.json same session.

lead_22.if_imap_finds_reply: Classify. If deal alive: present options A/B/C. Close target Thursday 2026-05-07. Skip LinkedIn.
lead_22.if_no_imap_reply: LinkedIn connection note (see linkedin_connection_notes.json vd_002). Write linkedin_profiles.json same session.

lead_1.if_imap_finds_reply: Classify. If still interested: agree quote form spec (£100-150). Set call this week. Skip LinkedIn.
lead_1.if_no_imap_reply: LinkedIn connection note (see linkedin_connection_notes.json vd_003). Write linkedin_profiles.json same session.

summary.hands_instructions: 1. IMAP sweep leads 3, 22, 1 from 07:00 Wednesday 2026-05-06. 2. If any conversion found: write CHANGELOG.md immediately — Campaign Milestone #1. 3. LinkedIn approach leads 1, 3, 22 from 07:45 if IMAP confirms no pending reply. Write linkedin_profiles.json same session — mandatory. 4. If LinkedIn not done by 08:20: archive leads 1/3/22 permanently. 5. IMAP sweep remaining cohort 08:20-08:40. 6. fu_041-045 sends from 08:45.
